headline: Dow Jones Futures: Mixed Market Signals As Micron's Gain Is Apple's Pain
summary: The Nasdaq reversed lower again while the Dow came off record highs. Micron soared but Apple led other tech titans lower.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: Mixed Market Signals As Micron's Gain Is Apple's Pain

headline: FedEx Freight forecasts growth after spin-off despite margin pressure in Q4
summary: Investing.com -- FedEx Freight on Thursday outlined a stronger earnings outlook for the remainder of 2026 as it begins operating as an independent publicly traded company, despite reporting sharply lower quarterly profit due to separation-related costs, weaker shipment volumes and higher labor expenses.

headline: FedEx (FDX) Stock After 20% Pullback Is The Market Pricing In Too Much Caution
summary: If you are wondering whether FedEx at around US$316.83 is still offering value after a strong run, the key is to understand what the current price actually reflects about the company. The stock has pulled back recently, with the share price down 2.8% over the past week and 19.6% over the past month, although it remains up 8.1% year to date and 80.7% over the past year. Recent news around FedEx has focused on its role as a major global logistics provider and how the company is positioned as...

headline: FedEx Announces Commencement of Cash Tender Offers
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., June 25, 2026--FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) ("FedEx") today announced that it has commenced cash tender offers (each, an "Offer" and, collectively, the "Offers") for the maximum principal amount of validly tendered (and not validly withdrawn) notes set forth below (collectively, the "Notes"), such that the aggregate purchase price, not including accrued and unpaid interest, payable in respect of such Notes will not exceed $4.15 billion (the "Offer Cap"). headline: Local Family Opens New PostalAnnex Location in Clovis, California
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., one of the leading franchisors in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is proud to announce the opening of its newest PostalAnnex location in Clovis, CA to new owners, Guriqbal and Manpreet Cheema. This new PostalAnnex is set to offer a wide range of essential shipping, mailbox rental and office services to the local community.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on FedEx, Lowers Price Target to $365
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Lucas Servera   maintains FedEx (NYSE:FDX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $425 to $365.

headline: FedEx to send tariff refunds to customers starting in August
summary: The carrier will prioritize returning duties first to shippers that opt in to sharing shipment and refund data with vendor partners.

raw.headline: FedEx to send tariff refunds to customers starting in August
